channel.title: IBD LitMonitor - Pathogenesis & Basic Science
channel.description: IBD literature monitoring: Pathogenesis & Basic Science

item.title: Drugst.One DREAM-Drug repurposing through expert annotation and modification.
item.description: British journal of pharmacology - Complex diseases often lack an actionable understanding of their underlying causal biological mechanisms, which leads to treating symptoms rather than causes. Network and systems medicine define di...

item.title: Lacticaseibacillus paracasei 18 effectively ameliorates dextran sodium sulfate-induced colitis in mice through regulating gut microbiota metabolite-mediated PI3K/AKT/NF-κB signaling pathway.
item.description: International immunopharmacology - Ulcerative colitis (UC) is a persistent inflammatory bowel disorder marked by mucosal inflammation and dysbiosis of the gut microbiome. Lacticaseibacillus paracasei 18 (LP18) is a versatile carbohy...

item.title: Isoliquiritigenin suppresses ER stress-driven epithelial apoptosis to preserve barrier integrity in colitis.
item.description: Toxicology and applied pharmacology - Ulcerative colitis (UC) is an inflammatory bowel disease characterized by epithelial barrier disruption and chronic mucosal inflammation, and its underlying mechanisms remain incompletely understoo...

item.title: Euphorbia humifusa Willd. alleviates ulcerative colitis by inhibiting lipid peroxidation via ACSL4/COX-2 axis.
item.description: Journal of ethnopharmacology - Herba Euphorbiae Humifusae (Euphorbia humifusa Willd., EH), named Dijincao, a traditional Chinese herbal medicine used to treat dysentery and enteritis, shows therapeutic potential for ulcerative c...

item.title: Effect of Intravesical Administration of Steroid Enemas on an Experimental Autoimmune Interstitial Cystitis-Like Mouse Model.
item.description: Neurourology and urodynamics - Interstitial cystitis/bladder pain syndrome (IC/BPS) is a chronic, non-bacterial cystitis presenting with bladder pain, frequent urination, and Hunner's lesions. Current therapies, including dimeth...

item.title: Bee venom acupuncture therapy ameliorates ulcerative colitis by reducing inflammatory response, oxidative stress, and suppressing the NF-κB/HIF-1α pathway.
item.description: Open life sciences - Ulcerative colitis (UC) is a chronic inflammatory bowel disease that poses a significant challenge to public health due to its relapsing nature and complex pathogenesis. This study investigated the...

item.title: Mechanism of recombinant Trichinella spiralis antigen p53 alleviating experimental colitis via the IDO-AhR Axis.
item.description: International immunopharmacology - Inflammatory Bowel Disease (IBD) is a chronic inflammatory disorder characterized by disrupted intestinal immune homeostasis. Emerging evidence indicates that parasitic infections may exert anti-in...

item.title: Comparative pharmacodynamic material basis of oral and colonic administration of Baitouweng decoction in experimental ulcerative colitis.
item.description: Journal of ethnopharmacology - Baitouweng Decoction (BTWD) is a traditional Chinese medicine formula widely used in clinical practice for treating ulcerative colitis (UC). However, its precise therapeutic mechanisms remain uncle...

item.title: MiR-155 knockout alleviates colitis exacerbated by EHDPHP exposure through inhibition of the JAK-STAT-p53 axis and apoptosis.
item.description: Journal of hazardous materials - The increasing environmental concentration of the organophosphate ester 2-ethylhexyl diphenyl phosphate (EHDPHP) poses a threat to global health, particularly for individuals with preexisting condi...

item.title: Eupalinolide B alleviates ulcerative colitis by targeting HMGB1 through modulation of the HMGB1/TLR4/MyD88/NF-κB signaling pathway.
item.description: Phytomedicine : international journal of phytotherapy and phytopharmacology - Ulcerative colitis (UC) is a chronic, relapsing inflammatory bowel disease with limited therapeutic options. Eupalinolide B (EB), a guaianolide sesquiterpene lactone derived from Eupatorium lindley...

item.title: Modified gegen qinlian decoction ameliorates Veillonella parvula-exacerbated ulcerative colitis via restoration of intestinal mucosal barrier function.
item.description: Frontiers in pharmacology - Ulcerative colitis (UC) is being increasingly connected to the pathogen Veillonella parvula (V. parvula). Modified Gegen Qinlian Decoction (MGQD), a traditional Chinese medicine therapy, is used to...
